subcodes.first_line: This day is the King of Days, and all peoples have been promised this blessed Day in the divine Books [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: الیوم سلطان ایام است و جمیع امم در کتب الهیه باین یوم مبارک وعده داده
subcodes.subjects: @rejection, opposition and persecution, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God, @presence of; reunion with God, @greatness and influence of the Cause; of this Day
